flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Skyline College rose 21% between 2007 and 2010 ($3.5k → $4.2k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Skyline College rose 109% between 2007 and 2010 (4.2k → 8.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Skyline College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Skyline College rose 42% between 2009 and 2010 (14.0% → 19.9%).
